title: dactylorchis umbrosa
intro: Dactylorchis umbrosa, also known as the shade orchid, is a species of orchid found in Asia. The plant contains a unique compound called dactylorhin, which is known to have medicinal properties. Dactylorhin has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems, offering benefits such as reduced inflammation and improved immune function. Traditionally, the plant is prepared in herbal teas or infusions, which can be made by steeping the roots or leaves in hot water.
